subtopics.title: Introduction to Word Processing
common_misconceptions: You don't need to save your work often
subtopics.teaching_note: Word processing software: Microsoft Word, Google Docs, LibreOffice Writer. Basic operations: typing text, selecting text (Ctrl+A), copying (Ctrl+C), pasting (Ctrl+V), cutting (Ctrl+X). Formatting: bold (Ctrl+B), italic (Ctrl+I), underline (Ctrl+U), font size, font type, color. Alignment: left, center, right, justified. Paragraph: line spacing, indentation. Save: Ctrl+S (save frequently!). Print: Ctrl+P.
